P

ParticleAdapter - Class in com.lulow.justtype.model.particles
Default adapter for IParticle.
ParticleAdapter(double, double, Rectangle) - Constructor for class com.lulow.justtype.model.particles.ParticleAdapter
Constructs a particle at the given position with the given render node.
ParticleEmitterAdapter - Class in com.lulow.justtype.view.particles
Default no-op adapter for IParticleEmitter.
ParticleEmitterAdapter() - Constructor for class com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.ParticleEmitterAdapter
 
play() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.animations.AnimatorAdapter
Default implementation does nothing.
play() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.animations.FadeInAnimation
Plays the fade-in from the beginning.
play() - Method in interface com.lulow.justtype.view.animations.IAnimator
Plays the animation.
play() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.animations.OvershootAnimation
Plays the animation.
play() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.animations.PressAnimation
Plays the press-and-release animation.
play() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.animations.ShakeAnimation
Plays the shake from the start.
play() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.animations.SlideInAnimation
Repositions the node at fromY and plays the slide-in sequence.
play(double) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.AshFX
Activates particle spawning.
play(double) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.ConfettiFX
Emits white confetti for the given duration.
play(double) - Method in interface com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.IParticleEmitter
Starts emitting particles for the given duration.
play(double) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.ParticleEmitterAdapter
Default implementation does nothing.
playColorful(double) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.ConfettiFX
Emits colorful confetti (using Theme.CONFETTI_PALETTE) for the given duration.
playEntranceAnimations() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.GameView
Plays the entrance animations for the timer pill, word display, input field, and submit button.
playInputAnimation() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.GameView
Plays the press animation on the input field.
playMusic(String, boolean) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.AudioManager
Plays a music track, stopping any currently playing track first.
playSfx(String) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.AudioManager
Plays a short sound effect.
PressAnimation - Class in com.lulow.justtype.view.animations
Simulates a physical press by scaling a node down, then releasing it back to full size.
PressAnimation(Node, double) - Constructor for class com.lulow.justtype.view.animations.PressAnimation
Creates a press animation for the given node.
